title: The Kozuki Retainers Reveal the Truth
description: On pages 0–3, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Speed, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Kiku, Luffy as The truth of the Kozuki retainers and Wano’s time-displaced rebellion is revealed as Kaido’s power closes in.
scene: Kinemon explains the Kozuki tragedy, the twenty-year leap, and the mission to overthrow Kaido and Orochi.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Tales of the Self-Progained Straw Hart Grand Fleetvol.46: Finkle (Second Half) "Pleased to Make Your Acquantance."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm LEAVING HER TO YOU, UMAMI!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The true effect of the Kibi- Dango!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm a headliner of the beasts pirates!! My name is speed!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no reason for me to listen to YOU!!

dialogue.speaker: Speed
dialogue.text: Why is speed listening to that kid...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's only natural for a servant to protect their master!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Big bro... I will never forget the taste...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: of the red bean porridge and the Apple I ate today!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll make sure my master gets to taste an apple, as well!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Tell the old man with the nose that I said hi.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll bring this dog back to you, I promise!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: www.k.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm gonna keep this Katana for a little bit longer, as well!! Can't be a Samural without one, after all!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let me take a look at it for a second... seriously.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But you haven't even been using it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: See you later!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: TAMA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: WOOF WOOF!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's go! I guess she didn't feed you the Dango to make you her servant, eh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: WOOF!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Mister Luffy- Taro!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Thank you for the treasure ship!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: So...

dialogue.speaker: Kiku
dialogue.text: Why are you coming with us, kiku?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, um... I've wanted to go and see open castle for a long time....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nobody is supposed to be at the ruins of open castle... so why exactly do they want to go there?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We've never seen this much food before!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: My Grandpa is healthy again!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's a gift from hell!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: FungAA Aaooh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: My child became healthy, too!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Benevolent pirate... how revolving...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I did something good~

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: didn't we steal that food...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffytaro and his friends are good people, but... I definitely cannot let my guard down just yet.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once we get to the castle, I'll slip away... I don't want to cause any trouble.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kiku, don't worry about it!! You're a good, strong person!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's not it. She's hiding something from us.

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kozuki Secret storyline with 39 dialogue beats. The Kozuki retainers reveal that Wano’s rebellion has been carried twenty years into the future.
